title: rubus rivularis var. rivulariformis
intro: Rubus rivularis var. rivulariformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus rivularis plant, a type of bramble in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus rivularis var. rivulariformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
